input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.7.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.7.2.2
            TITLE: the exhaust outlet(s) must be:

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.7.2.2: The Exhaust Outlet(s) must be:
IC.7.2.2 The Exhaust Outlet(s) must be: 
a. No more than 45 cm aft of the centerline of the rear axle 
b. No more than 60 cm above the ground.

final_answer: IC.7.2.2 The Exhaust Outlet(s) must be: a. No more than 45 cm aft of the centerline of the rear axle b. No more than 60 cm above the ground.
